title: AIPAck
description: Standard acknowledgment returned by POST /aip handlers.

ok.description: true if the message was accepted.

to.description: The agent that received the message.

task_id.description: Task identifier if the message triggered a task.

error_code.description: Machine-readable error code (present when ok is false).

error_message.description: Human-readable error description (present when ok is false).

correlation_id.description: Echoed correlation_id from the request, if present.
